AN EF-1 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN NORTHWESTERN NASSAU COUNTY NEAR BOULOGNE, OR JUST NORTHWEST OF HILLIARD. INITIAL DAMAGE POINT FROM THE STORM SURVEY IS THIS LOCATION, WHERE EF-0 DAMAGE WAS NOTED JUST WEST OF U.S HIGHWAYS 1/301/23 NEAR THE INTERSECTION WITH KARMA WAY, WHICH IS LOCATED JUST NORTH OF THE HILLIARD WEIGH STATION.

THIS IS THE FINAL DAMAGE POINT FROM THE STORM SURVEY IS THIS LOCATION. EF-1 DAMAGE WAS NOTED NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF MURRHEE ROAD AND CONNER CUTOFF, WHERE A METAL ROOF ON A MANUFACTURED HOME WAS PARTIALLY TORN AND BLOWN TO THE NORTHWEST, LANDING ABOUT 20 YARDS FROM THE HOME.
